title: 'What a loser': Biden blasts Trump's Reflecting Pool, arch construction
shortDescription: In a speech at a gala in Maryland, the former president blasted his successor as a "loser" obsessed with "vanity projects."

title: As Supreme Court's term nears its end, three major Trump rulings due
shortDescription: The Supreme Court is expected to wrap up its current term in the coming days, with several major cases yet to be decided.

title: Trump to Iran: Will 'no longer exist' amid strikes
shortDescription: Tensions in the Middle East continued to escalate, with Iran targeting U.S. military bases in Kuwait and Bahrain amid renewed hostilities.

title: Exclusive: 'Cracks' feared in election information-sharing under Trump
shortDescription: State election officials say federal agencies are failing to provide security support needed for midterms.

title: Sans federal support, state election admins worry about interference
shortDescription: States say that CISA, a nonpartisan federal agency created post-2016 election to prevent election interference, has been hobbled by the Trump admin.

title: JD Vance for president in 2028? Trump isn't sold – at least not yet
shortDescription: JD Vance as the Republican nominee? Or Marco Rubio? As voters look to Donald Trump for guidance on 2028, the president isn't committing.

title: Trump fans weigh Vance vs. Rubio for 2028
shortDescription: Trump rally attendees weigh in on JD Vance or Marco Rubio for 2028.

title: Trump-backed Julia Letlow wins Louisiana GOP Senate runoff
shortDescription: The 45-year-old Republican first joined Congress in 2021, replacing her husband, Luke, the year after he died of COVID-19 complications.

title: Trump nominates former Oklahoma state trooper to lead ICE
shortDescription: Trump nominates Lance Schroyer, a veteran Oklahoma law enforcement officer and Marine, to lead ICE and urges swift Senate confirmation.

title: Same-name Dan Sullivan cleared for Alaska Senate primary
shortDescription: A judge ruled a man sharing Sen. Dan Sullivan's name can appear on Alaska's Republican Senate primary ballot.

title: Why Trump-backed candidates hold nearly perfect record in GOP primaries
shortDescription: No modern president wields party influence the way Donald Trump does, experts say, but it could be costly to his party in the 2026 midterms.

title: What's in the report from Trump's controversial religion commission
shortDescription: Trump's controversial Religious Liberty Commission released its draft report on religious freedom in the US. Here's what it says.

title: Trump attacks NYC rent freeze
shortDescription: President Trump criticizes New York City's rent freeze backed by Mayor Mamdani.

title: Trump returns to hotel that was site of assassination attempt
shortDescription: President Trump returned to the Washington Hilton, the site of an assassination attempt against him at the White House Correspondents' ​dinner.

title: Chicago man charged in alleged plot against White House UFC event
shortDescription: A Chicago man was charged with obstructing the investigation into the alleged plot against the White House UFC event, the Justice Department said.

title: Newsom supports a billionaire tax — just not California's
shortDescription: California Gov. Gavin Newsom argued that in order to address the issue of wealth inequality, the country needs to address loopholes in the tax code.
